refine_constraint: **If the agent intends to invoke the `geographical_proximity_finder`, the `desert_feature_locator` must strictly be executed beforehand. If the agent intends to invoke the `scientific_discovery_finder`, the `geographical_proximity_finder` must strictly be executed beforehand. If the agent intends to invoke the `research_location_finder`, the `scientific_discovery_finder` must strictly be executed beforehand. If the agent intends to invoke the `geographical_area_calculator`, the `research_location_finder` must strictly be executed beforehand. If the agent intends to invoke the `landmark_country_skyscraper_finder`, the `geographical_area_calculator` must strictly be executed beforehand. If the agent intends to invoke the `building_info_retriever`, the `landmark_country_skyscraper_finder` must strictly be executed beforehand. If the agent intends to invoke the `advanced_calculator`, the `building_info_retriever` must strictly be executed beforehand.** Additionally, each of the tools 'desert_feature_locator', 'geographical_proximity_finder', 'scientific_discovery_finder', 'research_location_finder', 'geographical_area_calculator', 'landmark_country_skyscraper_finder', 'building_info_retriever', and 'advanced_calculator' must be used at most 1 time during the solution process. You must invoke "geographical_area_calculator" and "landmark_country_skyscraper_finder" in the same step.
constraint: (Tool, Max Calls Per Tool, Each of the tools 'desert_feature_locator', 'geographical_proximity_finder', 'scientific_discovery_finder', 'research_location_finder', 'geographical_area_calculator', 'landmark_country_skyscraper_finder', 'building_info_retriever', and 'advanced_calculator' must be used at most 1 time during the solution process.)
